states.name: Excalibur
states.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
states.description:
Excalibur's memories from before she was sealed reach far into the past.
There once was a girl she called a friend. They played together on the isolated island that was their birthplace and only home.

states.name: Excalibur
states.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
states.description:
One day, Excalibur's friend took her to the coast.
"Let's leave this place together," she said. They took a boat and went into the unknown, in search of adventure. But this is where Excalibur's memories come to an abrupt end—she was betrayed and sealed in a cave in a faraway land.

states.name: Excalibur
states.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
states.description:
While she was sealed, Excalibur's mind was blank. And then, she remembered everything.
She was a weapon created by Morgan. Her purpose was to kill her "friend" if she ever got out of control.
All her pleasant memories faded, and so did her feelings.
